hooks.command: git fetch -q origin main 2>/dev/null; behind=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$behind" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Current branch is %s commit(s) behind origin/main. Per CLAUDE.md, ALWAYS pull/merge origin/main and resolve conflicts BEFORE starting new work."}}' "$behind"; fi
